<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal O is at row 04 column D, but the direct path to the right is blocked by lava at row 02 column C. The safe route is to go down first, so I need to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

</thought>
<action>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

The safer route is to turn clockwise to face down, then move toward row 03.
